title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: motif and mutter bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for motif is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The motif packages include the Motif shared libraries needed to run applications which are dynamically linked against Motif, as well as MWM, the Motif Window Manager.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Motif Menu items that overlap with gnome classic toolbar cannot be clicked (JIRA:RHEL-87743)  Motif Menu items that overlap with gnome classic toolbar cannot be clicked (JIRA:RHEL-97048)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for motif is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The motif packages include the Motif shared libraries needed to run applications which are dynamically linked against Motif, as well as MWM, the Motif Window Manager.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Motif Menu items that overlap with gnome classic toolbar cannot be clicked (JIRA:RHEL-87743)  Motif Menu items that overlap with gnome classic toolbar cannot be clicked (JIRA:RHEL-97048)
